Uses of Class
com.irurueta.commons.validators.CreditCardBrand

  • Packages that use CreditCardBrand 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.commons.validators
    Utility classes to validate typical form data.

    • Uses of CreditCardBrand in com.irurueta.commons.validators

      Methods in com.irurueta.commons.validators that return CreditCardBrand 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected static CreditCardBrand CreditCardValidator.detectBrandFromPAN(byte[] panDigits)
      Detects credit card brand by using provided credit card PAN digits.
      static CreditCardBrand CreditCardValidator.detectBrandFromPAN(String pan)
      Detects credit card brand by using provided credit card PAN value.
      static CreditCardBrand CreditCardBrand.valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static CreditCardBrand[] CreditCardBrand.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in com.irurueta.commons.validators with parameters of type CreditCardBrand 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static int CreditCardValidator.getMaxDigitsForGroupAndBrand(int groupPos, CreditCardBrand brand)
      Returns maximum number of allowed digits for provided group position (starting at zero until the maximum number of groups minus one).
      static int CreditCardValidator.getMinDigitsForGroupAndBrand(int groupPos, CreditCardBrand brand)
      Returns minimum number of required digits for provided group position (starting at zero until the maximum number of groups minus one).
      static int CreditCardValidator.getNumberOfGroupsForBrand(CreditCardBrand brand)
      Returns number of digit groups for provided credit card brand.
      protected static byte[][] CreditCardValidator.groupingsForBrand(CreditCardBrand brand)
      Returns credit card digit groupings for provided credit card brand.
      static boolean CreditCardValidator.isBrandActive(CreditCardBrand brand)
      Indicates if provided credit card brand is still being used commercially.
      static boolean CreditCardValidator.isValidationEnabledForBrand(CreditCardBrand brand)
      Indicates if a given credit card brand uses Luhn algorithm to validate PAN values.
      protected static boolean CreditCardValidator.isValidLength(byte[] panDigits, CreditCardBrand brand)
      Indicates if provided array of credit card PAN digits has an appropriate length for provided credit card brand.
      static boolean CreditCardValidator.isValidLength(String pan, CreditCardBrand brand)
      Indicates if provided credit card PAN has an appropriate length for provided credit card brand.
